# Impression Originale

> Luxury gift wrap, ribbons, gift boxes, gift bags, gift tags and hand-tied bows, designed and manufactured in France.

Impression Originale creates premium gift packaging for retailers, luxury brands, corporate gifting, special events, and individuals. Every collection is based on original artwork and combines elegant design with high-quality materials. Whenever possible, products are made in France using recycled and responsibly sourced materials.

## Key Facts

- Ships to: Worldwide, shipped from Angers (Loire Valley), France. Free shipping from €70 in Europe, €120 rest of world.
- Currency & pricing: EUR; premium/luxury positioning. Payment via Stripe (Visa, MasterCard, Amex, Carte Bleue), PayPal, Apple Pay, Google Pay.
- Standard lead time: Dispatch within 1–2 business days; delivery ~1–4 business days in France (Colissimo/TNT), 4–16 business days international.
- Custom/bespoke available: Yes — bespoke personalisation (calligraphy, gold hot-stamping, engraving, paper sculpture) by appointment / quote on request.

## Products

- [Gift Wrap Collection](https://www.impressionoriginale.com/wrap/): Luxury wrapping paper featuring exclusive artist-designed collections.
- [Luxury Ribbons](https://www.impressionoriginale.com/ribbons/): Satin, grosgrain, velvet and decorative ribbons for premium gift presentation.
- [Gift Boxes](https://www.impressionoriginale.com/bags-boxes/gift-boxes/): Premium rigid and folding gift boxes in a variety of sizes and finishes.
- [Gift Bags](https://www.impressionoriginale.com/gift-bags/): Elegant paper gift bags for retail, gifting and events.
- [Gift Tags](https://www.impressionoriginale.com/gift-tags/): Coordinated gift tags designed to complement each collection.
- [Hand-Tied Bows](https://www.impressionoriginale.com/bows/): Ready-made bows handcrafted for premium gift presentation.

## Gift Occasions

- [Christmas Gift Wrapping](https://www.impressionoriginale.com/christmas/): Festive luxury wrap, ribbons and accessories for the holiday season.
- [Wedding Gift Packaging](https://www.impressionoriginale.com/wedding-celebration/): Elegant packaging for wedding gifts, favours and celebrations.
- [Birthday Gift Wrap](https://www.impressionoriginale.com/birthday-party/): Colourful artist-designed wrap and coordinating accessories for birthdays.
- [Baby Shower & New Baby](https://www.impressionoriginale.com/baby-shower-kid/): Soft, celebratory designs for baby showers and newborn gifts.
- [Valentine's Day](https://www.impressionoriginale.com/valentine/): Romantic wrap, ribbons and tags for Valentine's gifting.

## Business & Corporate

- [Corporate Gift Packaging](https://www.impressionoriginale.com/corporate-gifts-order-form-online/): Branded and bespoke packaging solutions for corporate gifting programmes.
- [Wholesale & Trade](https://www.impressionoriginale.com/become_a_dealer/): Trade accounts and how to become a dealer.
- [Business Solutions](https://www.impressionoriginale.com/business/): Packaging programmes for retailers, boutiques and luxury houses.

## Français

French-language versions of the store and main collections.

- [Boutique française](https://www.impressionoriginale.com/fr/): Version française du site.
- [Papier cadeau de luxe](https://www.impressionoriginale.com/fr/papier-cadeau/): Papier cadeau haut de gamme aux motifs d'artistes.
- [Rubans](https://www.impressionoriginale.com/fr/ruban/): Rubans satin, gros-grain et velours pour emballages cadeaux.
